basics.name: Alex Mercer
basics.label: Growth Marketing Manager
basics.summary: Data-driven Growth Marketer with 6+ years of experience scaling B2B SaaS startups. Expert in customer acquisition, funnel optimization, and high-budget performance marketing strategies.

work.name: SaaSify Metrics
work.summary: Owned the user acquisition pipeline, scaling monthly recurring revenue (MRR) from $50k to $250k within two years.
highlights: Managed a $40k/month paid advertising budget across Google, LinkedIn, and Meta platforms.
Designed and executed A/B conversion tests that lifted landing page signups by 34%.
Deployed HubSpot automated workflows to nurture leads, decreasing checkout abandonment by 18%.

work.name: Pixel Craft Agency
work.summary: Executed omni-channel digital marketing campaigns for various e-commerce and tech clients.
highlights: Built SEO content strategies that increased organic search traffic by 120% for top-tier accounts.
Analyzed weekly campaign performance metrics using Google Analytics 4 and Tableau.

volunteer.summary: Assisted a local environmental non-profit with their annual fundraising digital strategy.
highlights: Optimized Google Ad Grants program, capturing $10,000/month in free search advertising.
Increased online donations by 40% year-over-year through targeted email campaigns.

awards.title: Top 30 Under 30 Marketers
awards.summary: Recognized for exceptional growth achievements and innovative campaign execution in the SaaS sector.

publications.name: The Blueprint for B2B Funnel Optimization
publications.summary: A comprehensive tactical guide on mapping, tracking, and fixing leaky marketing funnels.

projects.name: Growth Hacking Checklist
projects.description: An interactive web app that helps early-stage founders audit their marketing strategies and discover growth opportunities.
highlights: Built using Webflow and integrated with Airtable for data storage.
Generated over 5,000 organic leads within the first month of launching on Product Hunt.

references.name: Sarah Jenkins
references.reference: Alex has a rare mix of deep analytical skills and creative problem-solving. He completely transformed our acquisition framework and consistently hit our CAC goals.
